sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n90939" key="prwto/baqros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πρωτό-βαθρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n90939.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">taking the first seat</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0486.tlg001:226" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pherecr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">226</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
